message:
fix: run full migrations via canonical SQLite for ALTER TABLE support

FrankenConnection-based migrations intentionally skip operations it
cannot handle (e.g. ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN reparsing). This left v10-v15
unapplied on existing databases, causing queries to fail with
"no such column: m.recipients_json". Now opens a second canonical
SQLite connection after base-mode migrations to apply any remaining
pending migrations. (closes #50)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
